reasoning: This prediction restates WIN-062 (Tesla longitudinal wave 1.574c). WIN-062 was verdicted Misleading because Tesla's patent US 787412 shows a spherical Earth diagram and describes surface wave propagation at ~1.57c — a known superluminal phase velocity in the Earth-ionosphere waveguide. The dome model relabels the globe circumference (40,075 km) as "disc diameter" (40,030 km), producing numerical agreement by construction since the disc radius was fitted to WGS84 geodesic distances. The prediction adds no new testable content: it repeats the same circular calibration as the WIN.
